name: Ralph Loop
summary: Fresh-context restart each iteration; memory in files+git; one task per run.
rejected_reason: Duplicate of spec-driven-loop, which already lists 'Ralph Loop' and 'Ralph Wiggum Loop' as aliases and whose solution is the same fresh-process-per-iteration loop (while :; do cat PROMPT.md | claude-code; done) with an agent-updated fix_plan.md and a test gate. The scan's context-discard distinctness is already implied by spawning a fresh process each iteration.
